retention_statement: Electronic: Retain master list of jurisprudence exam questions for 2 years or until no longer of administrative or reference value

series_description: Register of all applcants who take the Ohio licensure examination.
Contains all documents regarding investigation of non chargeable cases/complaints involving alleged violations of OAC/ORC Chapter 4734.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 fiscal years ; Electronic: Retain 3 fiscal years

series_description: Correspondence, licensure verifications, transcripts, etc. from individuals seeking a license or certificate, but do not submit an application to complete process.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 calendar year from date of receipt. ; Electronic: Retain 1 calendar year from date of receipt.

series_description: Licensee credential file. Series contains initial applications and supporting documents and transcripts for chiropractic, acupuncture and preceptorship. May also contain service requests, renewal applications, CE audit documents, reinstatement/restoration applications and supporting documents.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until death of licensee ; Paper: Retain until uploaded into electronic system

series_description: Contains Board meeting agendas, Executive Director's Reports, documents, etc., pertaining to matters considered and/or reviewed for public meeting.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Board meeting minutes documenting official board actions occurring at public meetings.
Contains all documents regarding investigation, charging, hearing and disciplinary action on cases/complaints involving violations of OAC/ORC 4734.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until death of licensee ; Electronic: Retain until death of licensee

series_description: BCI & FBI background check results received per application requirements.
retention_statement: Paper: Background check results are noted as having been received/reviewed via a checkmark in the application file. Retain FBI & BCI results for 1 year from receipt ; Electronic: Background check results are noted as having been received/reviewed via a checkmark in the application file. Retain FBI & BCI results for 1 year from receipt
